architecture.summary: New ensureFrontmatter utility in installer module, called at all SKILL.md write sites in canonical.ts and update.ts. No new architecture patterns.

integrations.summary: N/A - purely internal code change, no external services or APIs involved.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI tool internal change. No user-facing UI. Only SKILL.md file content is modified.

performance.summary: N/A - frontmatter parsing is trivial string manipulation during install, no performance concerns.

security.summary: validateSkillNameStrict regex enforces agentskills.io format: lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens, 1-64 chars. Prevents injection via skill names.

edge-cases.summary: Handles: no frontmatter, existing frontmatter without name/description, existing name preserved even if different from skillName, empty body (no paragraph to extract description from), CRLF line endings, frontmatter with extra fields preserved.
